academic.passage: Torque is a critical concept in physics and engineering, essential for analyzing rotational dynamics. It refers to the rotational equivalent of linear force, influencing how objects rotate around an axis. The importance of torque extends to various engineering fields, where the correct application of this concept ensures functionality and safety in mechanical systems. Understanding torque allows for better design and optimization of tools, vehicles, and machinery, making it a vital part of both theoretical studies and practical applications.

questions.q: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Torque is important in physics and engineering.
Torque only applies to simple tools.
Torque is irrelevant in mechanical systems.
questions.explain: 本文主要講述了扭矩在物理和工程中的重要性。

questions.q: What does the formula for torque include?
options: The distance from the pivot and the force applied.
The mass of the object only.
questions.explain: 扭矩的公式包含從支點到施力點的距離和施加的力量。

questions.q: What can be inferred about the applications of torque?
options: Torque is only theoretical and not used practically.
Understanding torque is unnecessary for engineers.
Torque is crucial for safe and efficient designs.
Only simple machinery requires torque calculations.
questions.explain: 可以推斷，了解扭矩對於設計安全和有效的系統至關重要。

questions.q: What does 'pivot point' refer to in the context?
options: The point around which rotation occurs.
questions.explain: 在上下文中，'支點'指的是旋轉發生的點。

daily.passage: Attention students: The library will be closed for maintenance this weekend. Please plan accordingly and return any borrowed materials before Friday. Thank you for your understanding!

questions.q: When will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 公告中提到圖書館將在本週末關閉。

questions.q: What should students do before the library closes?
questions.explain: 學生們應該在圖書館關閉之前歸還借用的材料。
